description: Content-SEO-led B2B SaaS at $400k MRR. High inbound, low ad spend, PLG plus sales-assist close.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: B2B analytics for ecommerce ops. Long-form SEO drives 70% of inbound. Self-serve trial with a sales-assist close above 10 seats. ICP is director-of-ecom at mid-market DTC brands.
